title: Get all emails for a contact, not just the ones since the contact has been created.
excerpt: A lot of our work is done by email, but it would seem that emails are only logged against a contact only once they have a record in Monday, so there is no way to view the emails in the system prior to adding them.

posts.author: KeithHalsey (Keith Halsey)
posts.cookedHtml: A lot of our work is done by email, but it would seem that emails are only logged against a contact only once they have a record in Monday, so there is no way to view the emails in the system prior to adding them.
